message:
perf: eliminate V8 deopt patterns — for-of on typed arrays, inline TextEncoder

- Replace for-of on Uint32Array with indexed loops in hot paths (operators.ts,
  partial-agg.ts) — V8 deoptimizes for-of on typed arrays
- Hoist TextEncoder/TextDecoder to module-level constants instead of
  creating per-call in wasm-engine.ts, local-executor.ts, master-do.ts
- Replace Array.from({ length: N }, () => ({})) with pre-allocated loop
  in parseWasmResult
